violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

The wall in the (retail) handsink area is in poor repair. Inspector observed exposed sheetrock and missing paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
The hand-washing sink in the basement prep area was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Staff drained sink and refilled to proper concentration during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

Working containers of rice and flour are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of marinating chicken. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024
Single service containers (juice containers) are being reused. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Inspector provided test strips during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024

The ceiling in the basement prep area is in poor repair. Inspector observed part of the ceiling cut out and replaced with uncoated dry wall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC stated there was a leak and is scheduled to be repaired today. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024
